CONFIDENTIAL DEAL MEMO - Project Bauhinia

To: Investment Committee
From: Mr Chan Tai Man, Senior Associate
Contact: chan.taiman@example.hk

Mr Chan Tai Man's HKID is A123456(3). Harbour Robotics Limited is listed in the
Companies Registry under CR No. 1234567.

The proposed acquisition is expected to be documented in a Share Purchase Agreement
with consideration of HKD 120,000,000. Closing Date is targeted for Q3 2026.

This memo is confidential and should not be distributed externally before announcement.
